name: Ledbetter v. Goodyear Tire and Rubber Company
question: Can a plaintiff bring a salary discrimination suit under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 when the disparate pay is received during the 180-day statutory limitations period, but is the result of discriminatory pay decisions that occurred outside the limitations period?
description: A case in which the Court ruled that a plaintiff cannot bring a salary discrimination suit under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act when the disparate pay is the result of decisions made outside of the 180-day limitations period.
